gate_type_docs.close: A stated level is confirmed only by a close on the requested side of the level. Intraday touches can move a red gate to red_but_tested, but never to green.
gate_type_docs.touch: A live or intraday price touching the stated level or band is enough to confirm the gate. This is the default for legacy support-band gates.
gate_type_docs.near_certain: A live price can confirm only when it clears the level by the gate's near_certain_buffer_abs or near_certain_buffer_pct; otherwise it remains red_but_tested until a close or clearer confirmation arrives.
gate_type_docs.context: Context-only gates annotate timing and never confirm or block by themselves.

gates.note: Canonical Notion gate from Newton 2026-06-11 3:06 PM ET: QQQ must close/hold above 717.50 before tech/growth add windows can be treated as confirmed. Prior 695-705 band is historical context only; QQQ closed 2026-06-11 at 717.22, so the gate remained unconfirmed.
gates.confirm_rule: full size only after QQQ closes/holds above 717.50; failure to reclaim keeps tech/growth adds at re-check or stage-only

gates.note: SMH 6/9: 10% intraday range, IV rank 100, P/C 4.5 - washout characteristics; favors staged entries over chases
